title: Duck By YKSAMI1
description: Duck for 1.20.1 forge. Only I added only silly duck.
body:
**Mod Description**

- This mod adds a silly duck to your game.
- Only does walk and give you experience.
- It has 6 hearts.
- Duck Spawn Egg in the "Spawn Eggs" tab
- The project category class is Minecraft mod
- The release stage is Release for 1.20.1 Forge
- The project category is environment


**FOR FUN**

 

_The Duck Story_

X = This duck what does it do?

YKSAMI1 = Nothing, only walk like silly. Doesn't have animation. Only walk and walk

....

YKSAMI1 =  And this duck gives you some experience you can kill for experience.

...

YKSAMI1 = Yeah that's all

X = WoW tHaT's So CoOl. I wAnT tO oThEr VeRsİoNs

YKSAMI1 = Shut up... Maybe
